aeo_readiness.summary: The business has some foundational elements for AEO but lacks critical optimizations for better search visibility and user engagement.
quick_wins: Implement a Google Business Profile (GBP) to improve local search presence.
Add structured data for services and products to enhance search snippets.
Encourage customer reviews to build credibility and improve local search rankings.

gbp_analysis.summary: No Google Business Profile (GBP) was found for Freedom Heating & Air Conditioning. This is a critical gap for local search visibility.
critical_issues: Lack of GBP means the business is invisible in Google Maps and local search packs.
No customer reviews or ratings to build trust and authority.

nap_citations.summary: The business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are not consistently cited across the web, which affects local SEO.
action_items: Ensure NAP consistency across all online directories and platforms.
List the business on major local directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and industry-specific sites.
Monitor and update NAP information regularly to maintain accuracy.

schema_gaps: Service schema for specific HVAC, plumbing, and electrical services.
Review schema to highlight customer testimonials and ratings.
Product schema for water treatment products and systems.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of GBP and customer reviews severely limits local search visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local HVAC, plumbing, or water treatment services in Minneapolis, Minnesota, and Wisconsin.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating and optimizing a GBP listing and actively managing customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Building a strong online presence through consistent NAP, structured data, and high-quality content to establish the business as a local authority.

page_title: Water Treatment, HVAC, Plumbing & Electrical – MN & WI | Aquarius Home Services
